role_in_text: developer of execution infrastructure for quantum computing
occurrence_sentence: Horizon Quantum's execution infrastructure is designed to run complex programs with general control flow.
When the hardware only supports circuits, our execution infrastructure implements the same program by stitching together multiple runs, emulating a system capable of general control flow.
Depending on the system a Triple Alpha user targets, our execution infrastructure implements control flow through one of two methods.

Producing control systems code with control flow Our execution infrastructure abstracts the control system, so developers can compile higher-level programs into control-system code with control-flow logic.
Within our execution infrastructure, classical functions can be evaluated on measurement results during program execution.

The technical progress across our development, deployment, and execution infrastructure represents the first steps toward a true quantum operating system (OS)—the software that bridges the gap between QPU hardware resources and user applications, much like how a classical OS manages CPU cores, memory, storage, and I/O for classical applications.

Triple Alpha connects users to a range of quantum processors and simulators

Triple Alpha—our integrated development environment—is being built to make that vision a reality. It is designed to deliver the most capable and accessible tools for writing complex programs that run across the quantum hardware of today and tomorrow. Triple Alpha connects developers to Horizon Quantum's software infrastructure, empowering them to build portable, hardware-agnostic applications.

role_in_text: developer of Triple Alpha quantum software development environment
occurrence_sentence: Triple Alpha—our integrated development environment—is being built to make that vision a reality.

With proprietary Turing-complete languages and an optimizing compiler, Triple Alpha enables developers to write complex quantum programs that include advanced capabilities, such as control flow and dynamic memory allocation. Using Horizon Quantum's deployment and execution infrastructures, they can run these programs on today's quantum computers, essentially expanding the capabilities of current hardware.

At the same time, Triple Alpha enables fine-grained control, such as [pulse-level programming](https://www.horizonquantum.com/product/advanced-capabilities/pulse-control), so that quantum specialists can access quantum processors at the lowest level of abstraction.

role_in_text: A compiler that ensures portability across quantum hardware
